_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: we detected abundant nuclear TAZ and YAP expression in MPNST specimens, which displayed significantly higher proportions of TAZ+ and YAP+ cells than benign neurofibromas or normal nerves
details: Successfully detected abundant nuclear YAP expression in MPNST specimens with significantly higher proportions of YAP+ cells than benign neurofibromas or normal nerves
